originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Training Maze Solver and Setting Up Neptune Sweep with PufferLib
summary: Worked on training a maze-solving reinforcement learning model using PufferLib; the model could see the goal but struggled to reach it on harder mazes. Set up a Neptune sweep for hyperparameter optimization across maze sizes 5 to 15, and prepared to install Ubuntu on a new server.
